creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On most recent CURRENT, gcc has gone.

The recreative port games/iourbanterror fails to compile due to hardcoded gcc.

Fix: Apply patched port's Makefile and "repair" a misguieded sed -e command in the toplevel Makefile of the port.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try compiling games/iourbanterror on most recent gcc-free CURRENT.
